CVE-2018-10921.title: Certain input files may trigger an integer overflow in ttembed in ...
CVE-2018-10921.description: Certain input files may trigger an integer overflow in ttembed input file processing. This overflow could potentially lead to corruption of the input file due to a lack of checking return codes of fgetc/fputc function calls.

CVE-2018-10922.title: An input validation flaw exists in ttembed. With a crafted input  ...
CVE-2018-10922.description: An input validation flaw exists in ttembed. With a crafted input file, an attacker may be able to trigger a denial of service condition due to ttembed trusting attacker controlled values.
